prompt: I need to set up monitoring in Meltwater to track my company brand mentions across news and social media. How do I build effective Boolean searches?
assertions: Explains how to create saved searches in Explore using Boolean operators like AND, OR, NOT, and NEAR/n proximity
Recommends starting broad with brand name in quotes then narrowing with NOT exclusions to reduce noise
Mentions setting up alerts for real-time notifications when new mentions match

prompt: How do I connect the Meltwater API to our internal analytics dashboard? I need to pull monitoring data programmatically.
assertions: Explains API authentication using the apikey header with tokens created in the Meltwater app
Mentions the base URL at api.meltwater.com/v3 and that HTTPS is required
Covers at least one relevant API feature area like Listening exports or Social Analytics for pulling data

prompt: What should I watch out for before signing a Meltwater contract? My team is evaluating it for media monitoring.
assertions: Warns about non-transparent pricing and the need to negotiate since there is no public pricing page
Mentions contract auto-renewal and advises canceling well before the renewal date
Notes that API access and certain features like Mira AI may require additional packages beyond the base contract
